notes: Core structure exists with platforms, ladrels, barrels, and player but barrel rolling/falling logic is erratic, platform collision is unreliable causing player to fall through or get stuck, and the goal detection zone is poorly placed making the game nearly unwinnable in practice.

Core game loop is present and playable, but a logic flaw in barrel collision prevents barrels from falling down ladders (they instantly re-collide with the platform they are on), reducing the arcade accuracy and challenge.

The build is stable and broadly recognizable as Donkey Kong, but core mechanics are simplified with noticeable logic inaccuracies in climbing, collision/jump scoring, and stage progression that keep it well short of a polished benchmark-quality recreation.
